name: Mickey Rivers
transactions: January 27, 1968:Drafted by theChicago White Soxin the1st round(13th pick) of the 1968 amateur draft (January), but did not sign.
June 7, 1968:Drafted by theNew York Metsin the8th roundof the 1968 amateur draft (June Secondary), but did not sign.
February 1, 1969:Drafted by theWashington Senatorsin the1st round(8th pick) of the 1969 amateur draft (January Secondary), but did not sign.
June 5, 1969:Drafted by theAtlanta Bravesin the2nd roundof the 1969 amateur draft (June Secondary).
September 8, 1969:Traded by theAtlanta BraveswithClint Comptonto theCalifornia AngelsforBob PriddyandHoyt Wilhelm.
December 11, 1975:Traded by theCalifornia AngelswithEd Figueroato theNew York YankeesforBobby Bonds.

July 30, 1979:Traded by theNew York Yankeeswith players to be named later to theTexas Rangersfor players to be named later,Amos Lewis(minors) andOscar Gamble. TheNew York YankeessentBob Polinsky(minors) (October 8, 1979),Neal Mersch(minors) (October 8, 1979) andMark Softy(minors) (October 8, 1979) to theTexas Rangersto complete the trade.
 TheTexas RangerssentRay Fontenot(October 8, 1979) andGene Nelson(October 8, 1979) to theNew York Yankeesto complete the trade.
